meaning: adj.唠叨的,挑剔的n.唠叨,挑剔
examples: Stop nagging—I'll do it as soon as I can.
She had been nagging him to paint the fence.
Even her own party considered her shrewish and nagging, and cold-shouldered her in the corridors.
You'll be able to set reminders for nagging pop-ups ("buy milk" is the obvious example).
Yet there seems to be little political will to fix the nagging problem of Social Security.
